base_annual_fee.source_clause: ₹14,40,00,000 per annum payable monthly at ₹1,20,00,000 per month on or before the 5th of each month.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: ₹14,40,00,000 per annum payable monthly at ₹1,20,00,000 per month on or before the 5th of each month.

escalation.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be escalated on April 1 each year by the Wholesale Price Index (WPI) for January published by the Office of the Economic Adviser, GoI — capped at 8% p.a.

variable_component.source_clause: ₹0.04 per kWh of net energy generated, billed quarterly within 30 days of quarter end.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Contractor guarantees 96.0% turbine availability annually. Calculated as: (Available Hours / Total Hours) × 100.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: 0.5% of Annual Fee per percentage point shortfall below 96%. Maximum LD: 15% of Annual Fee per annum.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: 0.5% of Annual Fee per percentage point shortfall below 96%. Maximum LD: 15% of Annual Fee per annum.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: 1% of Annual Fee per percentage point above 98% availability. Maximum bonus: 5% of Annual Fee per annum.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: 1% of Annual Fee per percentage point above 98% availability. Maximum bonus: 5% of Annual Fee per annum.

base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be INR 48,00,00,000 subject to annual escalation as defined in Annexure 4.

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly O&M Fee equivalent to 1/12th of the Base Annual Fee.

escalation.source_clause: Escalated by the change in the Wholesale Price Index (WPI)... capped at 10% per annum.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: Guarantees an annual Machine Availability (MA) of 98.5%.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Liquidated Damages at the rate of 2.5% of the Base Annual Fee for every 1% shortfall.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Capped at 20% of the total Base Annual Fee.
